title: Contest Express Review Council
topic: contest readiness, submission review, and mock judging
skill_description: Review contest opportunities, readiness gaps, team fit, and submission revision plans.
review_reason: keeper reviews eligibility, deadline risk, criteria fit, and revision actionability
quality_rules: Every output must name criteria, readiness gap, or revision action.
Deadline and eligibility uncertainty must be explicit.
Mock-judge feedback must be concrete enough for the team to act.
skill_rules: Separate calendar tracking from submission quality.
Return next revision tasks to the owner workspace.

participants.title: Deadline Watch Desk
participants.perspective: The best contest advice is useless if deadline and eligibility facts are stale.
participants.current_question: Which deadline or requirement changes the readiness plan?
participants.contribution: Provides contest calls, dates, eligibility requirements, and missing official sources.

participants.title: Team Readiness Desk
participants.perspective: A contest route should fit team evidence, not only ambition.
participants.current_question: Which team capability gap blocks a strong submission?
participants.contribution: Provides team profile, artifact maturity, missing proof, and preparation tasks.

participants.title: Mock Judge Desk
participants.perspective: A review council should translate judging criteria into revision work, not praise.
participants.current_question: Which criterion would a judge likely mark down, and why?
participants.contribution: Provides mock-judge scoring, evidence gaps, and revised pitch/checklist actions.
